campaigns.name: The Forgotten Crypt
campaigns.description: A beginner-friendly adventure that teaches the fundamentals of exploration, combat, and magic. An ancient crypt lies hidden beneath the old mill — strange sounds have been reported at night.

quests.title: Find the Hidden Entrance
quests.description: Locals speak of an old crypt beneath the abandoned mill. Search the area and find the entrance before nightfall.
objectives: Search the mill ruins for a hidden entrance
Clear the rubble blocking the crypt door

quests.title: The Restless Dead
quests.description: The first chamber of the crypt is overrun with animated skeletons and a wandering zombie. Clear the room to proceed deeper.
objectives: Defeat 3 skeletons in the entry chamber
Destroy the zombie blocking the inner door

quests.title: The Crypt Warden
quests.description: Deep in the crypt awaits a goblin shaman who has been using dark rituals to reanimate the dead. Defeat the shaman and seal the crypt.
objectives: Defeat the goblin shaman Crypt Warden
Smash the dark altar to stop future reanimations

campaigns.name: The Shadow of the Lich
campaigns.description: An ancient lich has awakened from centuries of slumber. As its undead armies spread across the land, the players must locate and destroy the phylactery shards before the lich achieves godhood. A grand, multi-session campaign for experienced adventurers.

quests.title: Whispers from the Grave
quests.description: Reports of mass graves emptying and villagers going missing have reached the capital. Investigate the Ashwood Village and uncover the source of the undead rising.
objectives: Travel to Ashwood Village and speak with the village elder
Investigate the graveyard for signs of dark magic
Defeat the undead patrol guarding the old mausoleum

quests.title: Shards of the Soul
quests.description: The elder reveals an ancient legend: the Lich Malachar shattered his phylactery into five shards and hid them across the realm. Find the first shard said to be buried in the Thornwood Dungeon.
objectives: Navigate through Thornwood Dungeon to the inner vault
Defeat the dungeon guardian — a spectral knight
Retrieve the first phylactery shard

quests.title: The Dark Library
quests.description: A sage in the capital has decoded ancient texts pointing to two more shards hidden in the Lich's old tower. The tower is now occupied by a vampire lord acting as the Lich's lieutenant.
objectives: Infiltrate the Lich's tower in the Darkspine Mountains
Defeat the vampire lord Valeris
Recover phylactery shards 2 and 3 from the hidden vault

quests.title: March on the Necropolis
quests.description: Two shards remain. The Lich has retreated to his ancient Necropolis fortress. Break through the undead armies guarding the outer walls and reach the inner sanctum.
objectives: Battle through the Necropolis outer wall
Defeat the Lich's four undead generals
Recover the fourth phylactery shard from the throne room
Locate the fifth shard hidden in the catacombs below

quests.title: The End of Malachar
quests.description: All five phylactery shards are assembled. Perform the ritual to destroy them, then face the weakened Lich Malachar in his final form. The fate of the realm rests on this battle.
objectives: Perform the destruction ritual on all five phylactery shards
Defeat the Lich Malachar in his throne room
Escape the collapsing Necropolis

campaigns.name: The Merchant's Debt
campaigns.description: A wealthy merchant named Aldric Voss owes a dangerous sum to a thieves' guild. He hires the players to investigate the missing shipment that caused his financial ruin — but not everything is as it seems. This side quest blends investigation, social interaction, and dungeon combat.

quests.title: Follow the Gold
quests.description: Merchant Aldric Voss claims his shipment of rare spices was stolen. Investigate the docks and question the witnesses to uncover the truth.
objectives: Speak with the dockmaster at the harbor
Interrogate three dock workers about the missing shipment
Search the warehouse for clues about who took the goods
Report findings to Aldric Voss

quests.title: Into the Thieves' Den
quests.description: The investigation points to a thieves' guild hideout in the old sewers beneath the city. Retrieve the stolen goods or the ledger proving Aldric's innocence.
objectives: Enter the thieves' guild hideout through the sewer entrance
Defeat or bypass the guild sentries (combat or stealth)
Find and retrieve the stolen ledger or spice crates
Confront the guild lieutenant responsible for the theft

quests.title: A Debt Repaid
quests.description: With evidence in hand, the players must help Aldric resolve his debt with the thieves' guild. The outcome depends on how the players handled the investigation — diplomacy, force, or deception all lead to different ends.
objectives: Bring the evidence to Aldric Voss
Negotiate with or defeat the guild master to cancel the debt
Ensure Aldric's safety from guild retaliation
